summary: Iteration 64 - USSD Menu Overhaul Testing. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Farmer registration page (/farmer/inscription) has all form fields, Cooperative dashboard has 'Inscriptions USSD/Web' button, Cooperative inscriptions page (/cooperative/inscriptions) shows table with USSD/Web registrations, Agent Terrain dashboard has inscriptions tab with registration form. Orange Money and SMS are MOCKED.
critical_code_review_comments: USSD Welcome menu shows 3 options: 1. Je suis deja inscrit, 2. Nouvelle inscription, 3. Aide / Infos, 0. Quitter
USSD Recognition: existing farmer (+2250799999999) gets main menu with 6 options (Estimer, Versement, Parcelles, Conseils, Profil, Aide)
USSD Registration flow: 4 steps (name, coop code, village, PIN) + confirmation screen with summary
USSD Simple estimation: 5 questions (hectares, arbres >8m, engrais, brulage, age cacaoyers) then result with prime annuelle
USSD Detailed estimation: 9 questions (hectares, grands >12m, moyens 8-12m, petits <8m, engrais, brulage, compost, agroforesterie, couverture sol) then result with detailed tree breakdown
USSD Estimation result shows options: 1. Demander versement, 2. Refaire estimation, 3. Retour menu, 0. Quitter
POST /api/ussd/register-web validates: nom_complet (min 2 chars), telephone (min 8 chars), village (min 2 chars), pin (exactly 4 digits)
POST /api/ussd/register-web returns 409 for duplicate phone numbers
POST /api/ussd/register-web returns 400 for invalid PIN (not 4 digits or non-numeric)
GET /api/ussd/registrations returns {registrations: [], total: int} with fields: full_name, phone_number, village, coop_code, registered_via (ussd/web), created_at
POST /api/ussd/calculate-premium returns score, prime_annuelle, prime_fcfa_kg, eligible, arbres_par_ha, co2_par_ha
Frontend /farmer/inscription has all form fields with data-testid attributes
Frontend /cooperative/dashboard has 'Inscriptions USSD/Web' button in Quick Actions
Frontend /cooperative/inscriptions shows stats (Total, Via USSD, Via Web) and table with Canal badges
Frontend /agent/terrain has Inscriptions tab with registration form and recent inscriptions list
seed_data_creation: Multiple test registrations created via USSD and Web during testing (Test Planteur USSD, Test Web Planteur, First Planteur, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: USSD Menu Overhaul complete. USSD uses session-based state machine (not stateless). Each call to /api/ussd/callback uses same sessionId to maintain state. States: welcome -> register_name -> register_coop -> register_village -> register_pin -> register_confirm -> register_done. For estimation: main_menu -> estimation_type -> est_simple_q0..q4 -> est_result (or est_detailed_q0..q8 -> est_result). Web registration at /farmer/inscription, cooperative registrations at /cooperative/inscriptions, agent registration at /agent/terrain (Inscriptions tab). Orange Money and SMS are MOCKED.

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed
